_comment: Allowlist of intentional parity divergences between the Pascal DSL and our schema/decoder. Each entry must include a 'reason' and the 'commit' that introduced or documented the divergence. Applied by audit.py --gate to suppress known-good findings.

exceptions.reason: wbPerkEffect is a HARD_RAW_VAR (runtime Pascal decider that cannot be statically resolved). The schema uses a hand-written rstruct override that is more useful than raw_fallback and has been validated against real ESM data. Divergence is intentional.

wbFaceMorphs is complex character-creation appearance data (FMRI/FMRN sub-records per morph entry). Not decoded by current tools; schema omits it. Low risk — RACE records are editor metadata not used at runtime.

wbMorphGroups is complex character-creation morph preset data (MPGN/MPPC/MPPI/MPPN/MPPM/MPPT/MPPF/MPPK/MPGS sub-records). Not decoded by current tools; schema omits it. Low risk — RACE records are editor metadata.

wbTintTemplateGroups is complex character-creation tint/overlay data (TETI/TTGP/TTEF/TTET/TTEB/TTEC/TTED sub-records with nested conditions and texture arrays). Not decoded by current tools; schema omits it. Low risk — RACE records are editor metadata.

Runtime Pascal closure union decider (wbTopicDataDecider) — variant depends on Dialog Topic type which is only known at runtime. Static schema cannot resolve; raw_fallback is the correct representation.
Runtime Pascal closure union decider — DNAM value type depends on effect type resolved at runtime. raw_fallback is the correct representation.
Runtime Pascal closure union decider (wbCOEDOwnerDecider) — COED owner union variant depends on owner record type resolved at runtime. raw_fallback is the correct representation.
Runtime Pascal closure union decider (wbPLDTLocationTypeDecider) — PLVD value type depends on location type resolved at runtime. raw_fallback is the correct representation.
Runtime Pascal closure union decider (wbCOEDOwnerDecider). raw_fallback is the correct representation.
